caption: The video begins with a static image featuring the logo of Kanal13AZ, which is prominently displayed in the center of the screen. The logo consists of a red circle with the number "13" and the word "kanal" written inside it. Below the logo, the text "Kanal13AZ" is clearly visible. Initially, there is a light pink rectangular button with the text "abunə ol" (which means "subscribe" in Azerbaijani) and a YouTube play icon on it. As the video progresses, this button changes to a darker red color, maintaining the same text and icon, suggesting an interactive element encouraging viewers to subscribe to the channel. The background remains a plain, light gray throughout, keeping the focus on the logo and the subscription button.
